index_definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX address_types_pkey ON public.address_types USING btree (id)

CREATE INDEX idx_closures_ts ON public.channel_closures USING btree (closing_timestamp)
CREATE INDEX channel_updates_is_fee_update ON public.channel_updates USING btree (is_fee_update)
CREATE INDEX channel_updates_is_topology_update ON public.channel_updates USING btree (is_topology_update)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX channel_updates_pkey ON public.channel_updates USING btree (gossip_id)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX peer_sessions_pkey ON public.peer_sessions USING btree (id)
